title: Nephrodium biforme
intro: Nephrodium biforme, also known as the two-form fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Nephrodium biforme include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Nephrodium biforme is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is used to treat a range of ailments, including arthritis, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
